title: YardRx Email, Order Messaging & Compliance Updates
description:
Enhanced order confirmation emails to surface product availability and regulatory compliance information, ensuring customers understand material restrictions and upcoming product shipments. Updated YardRx service communications with improved renewal reminders and order status visibility, so subscribers have clear windows into their recurring deliveries and can plan accordingly.

Unified messaging across all order confirmation touchpoints — from payment confirmation through delivery — giving customers confidence in their fulfillment timeline.

YardRx Order Received Email Updates
YardRx Order Reminder Email
Update Home Services Links

title: Store Operations, Returns & BOPIS Copy Updates
description:
Refined in-store fulfillment messaging across BOPIS (Buy Online, Pick Up In Store) and curbside pickup experiences to help customers clearly understand their fulfillment options. Improved associate screens to surface returns-in-store processes, making it easier for retail staff to manage in-store pickup and return transactions.

Fixed order recovery logic for cancelled orders to ensure accurate downstream fulfillment workflows, preventing gaps in financial or inventory reconciliation.

items.title: Consumer Direct Dropship - AOS Screen Updates for Retailers (Returns In-Store)
Finance - Transfer order creation after order was cancelled.
Copy Change to BOPIS & Curbside My Store Page

title: Checkout & Payments + Fulfillment & Order Flow Updates
description:
Strengthened fraud detection by improving how parent order data flows to risk assessment systems, protecting against promotional abuse by properly tracking BOGA (buy one get another) order structures. Updated chargeback handling for split orders to ensure accurate financial reporting and payment integrity across complex promotional scenarios.

These changes reduce exposure to bad-actor promotional exploitation while maintaining smooth checkout experiences for legitimate customers.

items.title: Send Parent Checkout order number to Riskified to avoid BOGA free product pickups / deliveries
FPMR - Update chargeback on BOGA split orders

title: Fulfillment & Order Flow Release Updates
description: Improved Fulfillment & Payment Reconciliation (FPMR) reporting infrastructure to surface detailed order information for financial analysis and reconciliation accuracy. This enables operations teams to quickly identify discrepancies and ensure data integrity across the fulfillment pipeline.

items.title: FPMR - Ecom_Order_Detail Reporting Changes

title: YardRx Experience Release Updates
description: Fixed recurring order transfer logic to eliminate unnecessary inventory reassignments in YardRx subscription workflows. This ensures that subscription customers receive consistent, predictable delivery experiences without unexpected changes to their scheduled items — improving trust in the recurring service.

items.title: YardRx Renewals - Items Being Unnecessarily Transferred from RSC

title: Browse & PDP Experience + Fulfillment & Order Flow Updates
description:
Powered product discovery with new personalization capabilities: launched custom recommendation variables to surface relevant items across search results and product detail pages. Enhanced filtering options on product listing pages and refined promotional display logic to ensure delivery offers accurately reflect regional availability.

Optimized product recommendation placement for organic search visibility and improved error page navigation to help customers recover and find products easily. These changes work together to reduce friction in the path to purchase while surfacing more relevant recommendations.

title: Fulfillment & Order Flow + YardRx Experience Updates
description:
Expanded YardRx service options by allowing retailers to set preferred mulch brands for recurring orders — improving yard care personalization for landscape contractors and DIY customers. Refined inventory quantity handling to prevent data conversion errors, ensuring accurate stock levels and preventing ordering mistakes.

These improvements give field personnel more control over service delivery while reducing operational friction in inventory workflows.

items.title: YardRX - Allow Stores to Set their Preferred Brand (Phase 1)
Inventory Outs on AH.com - convert incoming floats back to accepted string values and round down the quantity

title: Bundles & Kits Release Updates
description:
Enhanced bundle management infrastructure with improved Power BI reporting to track bundle performance and data quality. Fixed back-end systems to prevent bundle headers from appearing incorrectly in receiving documentation and portal views, streamlining operations for back-office and field teams.

These changes ensure accurate bundle visibility across supply chain systems and enable better visibility into bundle performance metrics.

items.title: MBK: Power BI Report - Data Quality
Bundle Header sku is displaying on the Management/Receiving doc in ACENET
URE - Bundle SKUs showing on EJD Portal

title: Fulfillment & Order Flow + Browse & PDP Experience Updates
description:
Launched Phase 1 of major YardRx recurring delivery improvements, enabling customers to add items to upcoming orders directly from cart and results pages. Enhanced yard profile management with new size editing capabilities and service preference controls, giving customers finer control over their subscriptions.

Introduced promotional discount visibility at checkout and results stages, added order tracking indicators to distinguish online vs. mobile orders, and updated fulfillment documentation with application instructions for accuracy. Powered personalized communications with customer ID tracking in transactional emails, and refreshed product listing page design with modern UI patterns — making browse, discovery, and recurring order management feel cohesive and intuitive.
